dtype.note: bytes: INT8 (1B) for matmul/bmm operands, FP16 (2B) for non-GEMM; weights counted once per token (streamed, non-resident). intensity is predicted-side (measured roofline/knee = Phase 0.3/1).

note: on-grid Layer-B scaling: single-forward sigs at prefill {128,256,512,1024} and decode kv {128,512,1024}; all measured=true (sweep_matrix grid).
